title: Snow Ridden
description:
This is a modpack made for the snowy times surrounding new years, it has create and some quality of life mods to make it fun.

i hae tried my best to make it run smoothly and it does so (on my pc) plus its not a ram heavy modpack.
body:
Welcome to Snow Ridden, this is a modpack for the snowy seasons and is based around Create and having fun!

Quick note, this is my FIRST modpack so far so it could be a little rough around the edges, im stil learning to make modpacks so please bear with me on this ;) this modpack could also be getting updates if needed.

but always remember to be having a great time :) 
~East
